blended.narrative: Mount St. Louis Moonstone is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 13 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 50°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: light rain showers, highs of 44°F.
Friday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 4" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 3.4" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
